title: Welcome to the Windows 12 concept official project update
paragraphs: This app is not an exact prediction of any real Windows 12 release. It is a concept shell built around current Windows 11 design language and community discussion around future Canary and 27H2-style ideas.
The goal is to keep the shell more Windows-like over time, with smoother transitions, better windowing, stronger Settings surfaces, and a cleaner desktop anchored by This PC.
The project is intended to update once per month. Release notes, bug reports, and feature requests can be collected from the GitHub page you publish it from.
This build also introduces an optional native folder with C source files for future desktop effects, restart helpers, and wallpaper-related native utilities.
footnote: Preview software note: use this as a concept experience, not as proof of any official Microsoft plan or unannounced product design.
